Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY E. HELD PH.D., P.E.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Stipulation And [Proposed] Order Re: Consent Judgment.
APPEARANCES: Rebecca L. Woodson, Esq. of McKenna Long & Aldridge LLP 267-4137 for deft Fourstar; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE SETTLEMENT IS APPROVED. Stipulation and order signed in open court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
